text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After school, I start looking for Scarlet so we can get a head start on
today's training.

text_block_list.name: Teacher A
text_block_list.text:
Sorry for making you help me out all day. You were a big help
though, so I appreciate it.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Not at all, I'm just happy I was able to assist. Feel free to rely on me
whenever you need!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: And with that, I'll be off!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Sigh. They've been running me ragged since morning... Gotta prepare for training now, too—

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Eek?! T-Trainer?! Don't scare me like that!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
...Geez, did you come here just to get me? Well, you could have
saved yourself the effort! I was about to head over anyway.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
And just so we're clear—I wasn't tired at all. It was just your
imagination, a trick of the light.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Helping people out is kinda like an everyday thing for me. It's not a
big deal.
choice_data_list:
As long as you aren't pushing yourself too hard,
okay?

As long as you aren't pushing yourself too hard,
okay?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I know, I know. You might've forgotten, but I'm an honor student.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I'm more dependable than anyone else, and I never betray their
expectations. Whether it's my conduct, my studies, or my running—I'm
number one.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
That's who Daiwa Scarlet is! So a few errands aren't enough to faze
me.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Instead of prying into my private life, how about you focus on my
training?
choice_data_list: Didn't I say I would support you?
Didn't I say I would support you?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Y-you did say that when you scouted me... But didn't you mean
"support" in the racing sense?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Even then... You don't need to worry about me this m—

text_block_list.name: Classmate A
text_block_list.text: Hey Scarlet! Got a minute?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Ah... Wh-what's the matter? Something wrong?

text_block_list.name: Classmate A
text_block_list.text:
I have to prepare the cooking utensils for tomorrow's home ec class.
Sorry, but could you help me real quick?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Sure, I don't mind! I'll be right there, so could you go on ahead
without me?

text_block_list.name: Classmate A
text_block_list.text: Yay, thanks a bunch! I'm glad I asked you! I'll be waiting!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Sorry Trainer, but you should go on ahead too.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
It's fine, I got this. And it's not that I don't want you with me—I just
don't want to push my work onto others.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: So off you go! Get prepped for me training! I won't take long, okay?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Scarlet promptly shoos me away.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Thirty minutes later...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Sigh... That took way longer than I thought it would. Okay, let's get started.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
...Huh, what's wrong? Why're you staring daggers at me... Are you
mad? I do feel bad for making you wait, you know.
choice_data_list:
I'm worried you're taking on too much by
yourself.

I'm worried you're taking on too much by
yourself.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
N-not even close! Besides, if I can't even do this much, how am I
supposed to be number one?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I know I was late, so let's just train longer to make up for—
choice_data_list: You can rely on me more!
You can rely on me more!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
What the heck... You're making me look like the bad guy here, you
know?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Also... you are my trainer, so I... d-do r—

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh, never mind! Now I'm in a bad mood! Let's just hurry up and start
training!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Daiwa Scarlet—a student set on being number one. It looks like it'll
take a lot more time before she learns to count on me.
